title: Steamed Almond Porridge
description: A comforting and nutty German dish made with boiling water and steam for a whole30-friendly treat that is both chewy and satisfying.
instructions: Preheat your steamer pot according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Rinse the almonds in cold water and place them on the steamer basket or directly into a heat-proof bowl that fits inside the pot of boiling water.
Bring the water to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to medium-low to maintain a gentle simmer. Place the almond container(s) in the steaming water.
Cover and steam for 20 minutes, ensuring the water does not come to a rolling boil during cooking.
Remove from heat once cooked, let sit for 5 minutes before serving.
